data.title: CSK sign Akash Madhwal as Ayush Mhatre replacement
data.summary: Madhwal has featured in three IPL seasons - for MI and RR, picking 23 wickets in 17 matches

data.title: Rohit doubtful for Wankhede tie; Dhoni keeps CSK guessing
data.summary: While neither is fully fit to play the MI-CSK game, there is a remote possibility of Dhoni taking part as an Impact Player

data.title: Starc cleared by CA to play IPL
data.summary: The left-arm pacer will join the Delhi Capitals squad and could be in contention to play on May 1 against Rajasthan Royals

data.title: IPL Pulse: Discipline, patience and restraint

data.title: Data Shorts: The Ekana equation - LSG crack half the code
data.summary: A reinforced pace attack has brought clarity to one half of the equation, but persistent batting failures against seam still hold LSG back at home.

data.title: The Archer we feared is back in business
data.summary: Injuries may have stalled him, but not stopped him - Jofra Archer's latest burst is proof that his pace and threat remain undiminished

data.title: Langer: Ekana pitch is like playing at the WACA, we've not adjusted
data.summary: LSG's head coach admitted that they have failed to adjust to the pace and bounce at home, with another defeat exposing their mounting issues at Ekana

data.title: All-round Jadeja, bowlers lead RR back to winning ways
data.summary: Lucknow Super Giants were bundled out for just 119 in 18 overs as they slipped to their fifth loss in seven games

data.title: From KKR to RCB: Venkatesh Iyer adjusts to new dynamics
data.summary: The all-rounder opens up on moving away from KKR, waiting for opportunities at RCB, role clarity from the management, and his take on the impact player rule and team environment

data.title: MI rediscover rhythm as CSK search for answers
data.summary: Spencer Johnson could slot in for CSK, while MS Dhoni's return and Rohit Sharma's availability remain key selection calls for the two sides
